𝗞𝗢𝗢𝗗𝗢-𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗗𝗘𝗥 | Managing and reading a diverse collection of ebooks across multiple devices and platforms with cloud synchronization and advanced reading features.  🔥 Super Hot!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Managing and reading a diverse collection of ebooks across multiple devices and platforms with cloud synchronization and advanced reading features.
📅 Created: Mar 2020 • Updated: Apr 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Extensive format support (EPUB, PDF, MOBI, AZW3, TXT, FB2, CBR, CBZ, MD, DOCX, HTML, etc.)
✅ Cross-platform availability (Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS, Web)
✅ Cloud sync and backup with multiple providers (OneDrive, Google Drive, Dropbox, iCloud, etc.)
✅ AI-powered dictionary, summarization, encyclopedia, and translation
✅ Customizable reading layouts and appearance (scrolling, columns, themes, fonts)
✅ Reading aids like text-to-speech, bookmarks, notes, and highlights


✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Koodo Reader is a versatile, cross-platform ebook manager and reader that supports a wide array of formats. It offers seamless syncing and backup capabilities across multiple cloud storage services and operating systems, enhancing the reading experience with features like AI-powered tools and customizable display options.

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

𝗤𝗨𝗔𝗥𝗞𝗗𝗢𝗪𝗡 | To provide a unified and powerful system for creating diverse document types from a single Markdown source, enhanced with scripting capabilities.  🔥 Super Hot!

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a unified and powerful system for creating diverse document types from a single Markdown source, enhanced with scripting capabilities.
📅 Created: Jan 2024 • Updated: Apr 2026

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Markdown-based typesetting system
✅ Compiles to books, papers, knowledge bases, presentations
✅ Turing-complete extension of Markdown
✅ Supports functions and variables
✅ Includes a standard library with layout builders, I/O, math, conditionals, and loops
✅ Allows defining custom functions and libraries
✅ Seamlessly integrates with CommonMark and GFM


▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 10.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 277 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 16 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Quarkdown is a versatile, Markdown-based typesetting system that extends Markdown with scripting capabilities, allowing users to compile a single project into various outputs like books, papers, knowledge bases, and presentations. It supports functions, variables, a standard library, and custom extensions for dynamic content generation.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/iamgio/quarkdown

𝗠𝗜𝗦𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗟-𝗩𝗜𝗕𝗘 | To provide developers with an AI-powered conversational interface for interacting with and managing their codebases directly from the command line.  🌟 Rising Fast!

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide developers with an AI-powered conversational interface for interacting with and managing their codebases directly from the command line.
📅 Created: Dec 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Interactive Chat Interface
✅ Code Exploration and Modification
✅ File Manipulation Tools (read, write, search_replace)
✅ Shell Command Execution
✅ Code Searching (grep, ripgrep)
✅ Task Delegation to Subagents
✅ Project-Aware Contextual Understanding
✅ Autocompletion for commands and file paths
✅ Voice Mode
✅ Skills System for Custom Commands


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 418 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 94 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Mistral Vibe is an open-source, conversational command-line coding assistant powered by Mistral AI models. It enables developers to interact with their codebase using natural language, facilitating tasks like code exploration, modification, and execution through a powerful set of integrated tools.

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇
